enabled.title: Enable Speech Input
enabled.desc: Click speech button in status bar to start continuous recognition

tips.title: Instructions
tips.button: Click speech button in status bar to start/stop recognition
tips.requirement: Requires microphone permission and network connection

enabled.title: Enable Speech Output
enabled.desc: Automatically read AI responses when complete

autoPlay.title: Auto Play
autoPlay.desc: Automatically play when message is complete, disable for manual trigger

tips.title: Instructions
tips.filter: Automatically filters code blocks and tool calls, reads only plain text
tips.interrupt: Stops automatically when sending new message or interrupting

systemPrompt.enableDesc: Customize the system prompt sent to AI
systemPrompt.modeAppendHint: Append custom content after the default prompt
systemPrompt.modeReplaceHint: Completely replace the default prompt with custom content
systemPrompt.placeholder:
Enter your custom system prompt...

Available variables:
{{workspaceName}} - Current workspace name
{{workspacePath}} - Current workspace path
{{contextWorkspaces}} - Context workspaces list
{{date}} - Current date
{{time}} - Current time
{{defaultPrompt}} - Default system prompt
systemPrompt.resetConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset to default settings?
systemPrompt.variablesHint: Click a variable to insert it into the editor:

autoMode.description: Auto mode controls which actions Claude can perform without user confirmation
autoMode.descriptionDetail: Allow rules are executed automatically, deny rules require confirmation. These rules protect your system and data.
autoMode.customRulesEmpty: No custom rules yet, click above to add

lsp.description: Manage language servers (LSP) for code completion, diagnostics, go-to-definition, and more.

web.enableDesc: Allow browser access to Polaris over LAN
web.hostHint: 0.0.0.0 for all interfaces, 127.0.0.1 for localhost only
web.portHint: Use a port in the range 1024-65535
web.applyDesc: Save and click 'Apply' to take effect immediately — no restart needed
web.applyFailed: Failed to apply, please try again
web.accessHintDesc: Click 'Apply' to take effect immediately. Open the access URL in a browser to use directly.
web.qrHint: Scan the QR code with your phone to access the Polaris web interface
web.qrNoIp: No LAN IP detected. Please check your network connection.
web.qrDisabled: QR code will appear after enabling Web service
web.connectionLostDesc: Real-time updates unavailable. Please check if the desktop app is running.
